input:
INTERNAL AGENT NOTE
Property: studio apartment, Fuengirola seafront, 1 bed, communal pool, parking.
Owner: Spanish national, María C., inherited the property from her aunt.
She has never lived in it and wants a quick clean sale.
No emotional attachment. Will accept any offer above €155,000.
Asking €178,000.
Building was constructed in 1971 and has never had a horizontal
property ITE (technical building inspection) for buildings of this age —
theoretically required in Fuengirola for buildings over 50 years old.
The community president told us informally but it is not documented
anywhere the seller has shared. The buyer should commission an
independent survey.
Upstairs neighbour rents to short-term tourists — constant turnover,
reported noise issues. Community tried to restrict it; the owner
challenged the restriction and won. Situation unresolved.
Categories: C3 (floor €155k), C4 (missing ITE inspection — not disclosed by seller), C6 (neighbour rental situation, legal history of challenge)
output:
TAGS: [Seafront location] [Priced for quick sale] [Negotiation margin available] [Private parking] [Building: verify inspection status] [Ambient noise: verify]

DESCRIPTION: This seafront studio apartment in Fuengirola offers a prime Mediterranean location with access to a communal pool. It is an ideal choice for those seeking a convenient coastal retreat or a holiday base. This property is positioned for an efficient transaction and is available for immediate viewing.
